KFPS Friesian

Why dream black horse farm is the top choice for horse enthusiasts

Dream Black Horse Team
March 30, 2026
2 Views
You've done the research. You've fallen in love with the breed. You know a Friesian is the horse you want. Now comes the most important decision of the entire journey, who do you trust to find that horse for you? At Dream Black Horse Farm, we believe buying a Friesian horse should feel as magical as the breed itself. Whether you're a first-time owner in search of a beginner-friendly Friesian horse, an experienced equestrian ready to add a Friesian mare, gelding, or stallion to your program, or a breeder looking for your next Friesian broodmare, we built this farm for you.

We are Florida's dedicated Friesian horse breeder, importing directly from the heartland of the breed, Friesland, Netherlands, and connecting dreamers across every corner of the United States with the horse of their lifetime.

This is the story of who we are, why it matters, and why thousands of Friesian buyers across Florida, Texas, California, New York, North Carolina, Georgia, Tennessee, Virginia, and beyond trust us to make their Friesian dream a reality.

We Specialize in One Breed. Only One.

There's a difference between a dealer who sells everything and a specialist who lives and breathes one breed. At Dream Black Horse Farm, Friesians are not one of many options, they are the only option. Every horse in our program, every relationship we've built in the Netherlands, every piece of knowledge we've accumulated over the years exists for one purpose: to help you find the right purebred Friesian horse. That specialization means we know things that general dealers simply don't. We know which KFPS bloodlines produce the calmest temperament for first-time owners. We know which mares carry the Ster predicate that signals exceptional conformation. We know the difference between a horse that looks good on video and one that will genuinely thrive in your specific situation. When you buy a Friesian horse online from Dream Black Horse Farm, you're not clicking through a generic listing site. You're working with people who know this breed from the ground up.

We Import Directly From Friesland, Netherlands

The purebred Friesian horse originates from Friesland in the Netherlands, governed by the strictest breed registry in the equine world, the KFPS (Koninklijke Vereniging Het Friesch Paarden-Stamboek). Every horse in our collection is either FHANA registered or KFPS registered, which means they meet the exacting standards of the royal Dutch studbook and come with full documentation of their bloodlines, inspection scores, and predicates.

We don't source horses through middlemen or purchase from unknown backgrounds. We travel to the Netherlands, build direct relationships with trusted Dutch breeders, and handpick every horse ourselves. This means:

*Full KFPS papers with traceable bloodlines Horses that have been properly inspected and rated within the breed registry Access to Ster mares, Crown mares, trained geldings, young prospects, and foals, a complete range to match every buyer's goal and budget *Horses pre-screened for temperament, health, and suitability before they ever make the trip to Florida When you see a horse listed on dreamblackhorse.com, it has been personally selected by our team. That's a standard you won't find everywhere.

Our Inventory, A Friesian for Every Buyer

We understand that not every buyer is looking for the same thing. That's why our inventory is deliberately diverse.

🐴 Friesian Mares for Sale

Our Friesian mares range from young prospects to proven Friesian broodmares with established records. Whether you're looking for a dressage partner, a mare to add to your breeding program, or a companion with an exceptional pedigree, we have options across multiple price points.

🐴 Friesian Geldings for Sale

Friesian geldings are often the ideal choice for recreational riders and first-time Friesian owners. Calm, willing, and people-oriented, many of our geldings are specifically suited for beginner-friendly Friesian horse placements, riders who want the full Friesian experience with a horse that meets them where they are.

🐴 Friesian Stallions for Sale

For breeders and experienced riders seeking an exceptional black Friesian horse with performance potential and breeding value, our Friesian stallions for sale represent some of the finest blood the Netherlands has to offer.

🐴 Friesian Foals for Sale

Starting your journey with a young Friesian horse is one of the most rewarding paths in the breed. Our Friesian foals come from exceptional sport and show bloodlines, giving you the opportunity to shape a partnership from the very beginning.

🐴 Friesian Horses Under $20,000 and Under $50,000

We believe the Friesian dream should be accessible. Our inventory spans a range of price points, with options available for buyers looking for a Friesian horse for sale under $20,000 as well as those seeking a premium import with a Friesian horse for sale under $50,000 price ceiling. Contact us, we'll work with your budget honestly and transparently. We Ship Nationwide, No Matter Where You Are in the USA Dream Black Horse Farm is based in Florida, but our reach is national. We have successfully placed Friesian horses for sale with buyers in:

Friesian horses for sale in Florida, Our home state, with direct access to our farm Friesian horses for sale in Texas, Regular routes and trusted transport partners serving the Lone Star State Friesian horses for sale in California, Coast-to-coast delivery, including air freight coordination Friesian horses for sale in New York, Northeast buyers served with care and precision Friesian horses for sale in North Carolina, A growing Friesian community we're proud to serve Friesian horses for sale in Georgia, Southeast buyers close to home Friesian horses for sale in Tennessee, Heartland of American horse country Friesian horses for sale in Virginia, Mid-Atlantic placement with established logistics Friesian horses shipped nationwide USA, that's not just a promise on a page. It's something we do every month. Whether you're searching for Friesian horses for sale near me or you're on the other side of the country, we coordinate professional door-to-door transport with carriers that specialize in equine freight. Your horse arrives safely, on schedule, and cared for every mile of the journey.

We also coordinate Friesian horse international shipping for buyers outside the US, managing the full import Friesian horse to USA process including USDA APHIS permits, KFPS export documentation, quarantine, and customs clearance.

We Guide First-Time Buyers Every Step of the Way

One of the questions we hear most often is: "Is a Friesian horse good for beginners?" Our answer: yes, with the right horse and the right support system. And providing that support system is something we take seriously.

If you're a Friesian horse for first time owner, the process of buying internationally can feel overwhelming. KFPS papers, FHANA registration, pre-purchase exams, quarantine requirements, import logistics, it's a lot to navigate alone. We don't just hand you a horse and wish you luck. We walk with you through every step:

Pre-purchase consultation to understand your goals, experience level, and budget Honest matching, we'll tell you which horses are right for you and which aren't Full health documentation including veterinary records, blood work, and breed registration papers Post-purchase support with guidance on Friesian horse care, grooming, feeding, and what to expect in the first 30 days Connections to Friesian-knowledgeable trainers and vets in your area Knowing what to know before buying a Friesian horse is something we help every buyer understand before, not after, they make their purchase. That transparency is what sets us apart.

Frequently Asked Questions

In Conclusion

What Our Buyers Say Matters Most to Us The relationship doesn't end at the sale. Our buyers become part of the Dream Black Horse community, a network of Friesian owners across the United States who share a love for this extraordinary breed. We stay in touch, answer questions, and celebrate every milestone, from your horse's first trail ride to their first dressage test. That's what "We make your Friesian dream a reality" actually means.
